input:
Dear Valued Customer,

We are writing to inform you about an important update to your account security settings. To ensure the continued protection of your financial information, we have made some changes to our verification process. Please review the attached document for detailed information on how these updates may affect your account.

If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to contact our support team.

Sincerely,
Your Bank Security Department

Subject: Quick question about your recent purchase!

Hi [Customer Name],

Hope you're having a great day! We just wanted to follow up on your recent order, #[Order Number]. We're so glad you chose us! 

We noticed a small typo in the shipping address you provided. It looks like there might be an extra 's' in the street name. We wanted to confirm this with you before we send it out, just to make sure everything gets to you smoothly. 

Could you please take a quick look and let us know if the address is indeed [Potentially Incorrect Address]? Or if you'd prefer, you can reply with the correct address.

Thanks so much for your help!

Best regards,
The [Company Name] Team
